name: Resource One
description_short: Premier America Credit Union (formerly Resource One Credit Union) is a Texas-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and financial services to member-owners.
description_long:
Premier America Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative serving Texas communities for over 40 years. The organization recently completed a merger integrating Resource One Credit Union's Houston-based branches into Premier America's broader network, expanding its operational footprint and service capacity.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts (Premier Plus Checking earning up to 3.50% APY on balances up to $30,000), certificates of deposit, money market accounts, IRAs, vehicle loans, auto loans, mortgages, home equity loans, personal loans, lines of credit, and multiple MasterCard credit card options (Advantage, Signature, Credit Builder, and Secured variants). They provide digital banking through online and mobile platforms, including features like Zelle, CardSwap, Change Jar, and ClickSWITCH account migration tools. Business banking services include commercial checking, savings, money market accounts, business credit cards, commercial vehicle loans, and commercial real estate financing.

Premier America distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, emphasizing member-ownership and community reinvestment. The organization highlights a donation program tied to card usage supporting community initiatives, maintains 40+ years of service history in Texas, and underwent a strategic merger to enhance member benefits through expanded branch networks and service offerings. They provide wealth management services including comprehensive financial planning, retirement planning, and estate planning through dedicated advisors.

As a credit union, Premier America operates on a not-for-profit member-owned model rather than shareholder-driven structure. However, consumers should note the recent merger integration may affect service continuity during transition periods, and specific product availability or terms may shift as Resource One members fully integrate into Premier America's systems. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings accounts and Money Market accounts
Personal loans and lines of credit
MasterCard credit cards (4 variants: Advantage, Signature, Credit Builder, Secured)
Commercial vehicle and real estate loans
Wealth management and financial planning services
Business payroll services and remote deposit capture
pros: Premier Plus Checking offers up to 3.50% APY on balances up to $30,000 with a $200 new account bonus
Expanded branch network and ATM access following Resource One integration
Multiple credit card options including secured and credit-builder cards for various credit profiles
Comprehensive loan products including auto, home, personal, and commercial financing
Wealth management and financial planning services available through dedicated advisors
Member-owned credit union structure emphasizing community reinvestment and giving-back programs
Digital banking tools including Zelle, mobile banking, CardSwap, and account migration assistance
cons: Active merger integration may create service disruptions or system changes for Resource One members during transition
Website content does not specify loan rates, terms, or APR ranges for comparison shopping
Limited transparency on membership eligibility requirements or geographic service boundaries
Merger timeline and full details on product/service changes described as 'coming in weeks' without firm dates
Business services offerings less detailed than consumer banking products on available website content
best_for: Texas-based consumers seeking high-yield savings accounts with competitive APY rates
Credit union members prioritizing community reinvestment and member-ownership benefits
Borrowers needing diverse loan products from auto financing to mortgages in one institution
Individuals building or rebuilding credit using secured or credit-builder credit cards
diagnosis: Premier America Credit Union is best for Texas consumers seeking competitive high-yield checking accounts, diverse loan products, and community-focused banking through a credit union structure. Primary caveat: the ongoing Resource One integration may create service changes or temporary disruptions, and consumers should monitor the company's transition page for updates on timeline and specific product modifications.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
